Dolt: server crash-looped 5 times (signal fault in autoGCCommitHook goroutine, fault address 0x18ecd04f8). PID 95159 was dead. Witness manually restarted Dolt with direct dolt sql-server --config command. Server is now responding on port 3307. Root cause unknown - crash dump is in ~/.dolt-data/dolt.log. Recommend investigating autoGC behavior and archiving the crash log.

Dolt: SIGQUIT signal (goroutine dump) terminated server process; restarted manually via gt dolt start. Server confirmed healthy at 17:22. Also: refinery session is stopped. Original crash-loop from 16:10 may have been related to lc database missing (seen in logs). No polecats active.

Dolt: witness caused additional outage with SIGQUIT. CLAUDE.md says SIGQUIT sends goroutine dump on Linux, but on macOS SIGQUIT terminates the process. Sent SIGQUIT to PID 93466 (actual dolt process) while trying to collect diagnostics — this killed Dolt. Daemon restarted it (PID now 30174). Dolt stable now. CLAUDE.md goroutine dump instruction is unsafe on macOS: kill -QUIT kills the process instead of dumping stacks. Recommend updating CLAUDE.md to use correct macOS diagnostic command.
